history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A low-angle full shot captures two Indonesian high school boys in uniform, standing close together outdoors. The boy on the left wears a white short-sleeved shirt with a blue tie and a blue and white cap. His shirt has patches on the left breast pocket and the right sleeve. He has dark, short hair and is looking directly at the camera with a slight smile. He wears dark blue pants and white sneakers. The boy on the right also wears a similar white short-sleeved shirt, blue tie, and blue and white cap. His shirt also has patches. He has short, dark hair styled with bangs and is looking slightly off-camera with a neutral expression. He wears dark blue pants and black and white sneakers.

Behind them, a net is strung up, possibly for a volleyball court. Beyond the net, there's a building with a tiled roof and some greenery. The lighting suggests it's a sunny day, casting soft shadows and highlighting the vibrant colors of the uniforms and the surroundings. The overall mood is casual and youthful, typical of a school environment on a bright day. The color palette is dominated by the blues of the uniforms and caps, contrasted with the white shirts and the earthy tones of the background. The image has a slightly desaturated, natural look.
